features: Original Source: We capture the intensity nature has to offer. Original Source is made with 100 Percent natural fragrances, we’re inspired by nature, from bold scents and vibrant colours, we've made it our mission to share fresh sensorial hits in every shower
The Power of Nature: We pack 6 specially selected natural & fruit oils and 100 Percent natural fragrance into every 500ml bottle. Experience a lusciously juicy shower experience

100 Percent Vegan and Cruelty Free Original Source is proudly vegan and we carry the logo on all products. Products are tested on us, never on animals. This fragrance is created to offer a shower experience to stimulate the senses with an intense hit of nature
Paraben free: The Mango shower wash has been consciously made without parabens
Shower gel mutlipack: Extend your daily dose of fruitiness and nature with this 6 x 500 ml shower gel multipack
description: Product Description A shower gel multipack with 6 bottles bursting with a unique and fresh fragrance! Experience a lusciously juicy shower with our Original Source Juicy Mango shower gel. We pack 6 specially selected natural & fruit oils and 100 Percent natural fragrance into every 500ml bottle. Our products are tested on us, never on animals, paraben free and we’re proud to be Vegan too. Original Source Shower Gel is manufactured in the UK using 100 Percent renewable energy and our bottles are 100 Percent recyclable. Enjoy your daily shower time with a sensorial hit of nature! Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Polyquaternium-7, Parfum, Mangifera Indica (Mango) Fruit Extract, Sodium Benzoate, Tetrasodium Glutamate Diacetate, Lactic Acid, Styrene/Acrylates Copolymer, C11-15 Pareth-7, C11-15 Pareth-40, Glycerin, Potassium Sorbate, Diethylamino Hydroxybenzoyl Hexyl Benzoate, Ethylhexyl Methoxycinnamate, Limonene, Linalool, CI 19140, CI 15510. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. Manufacturer Contact Information Freepost PZ Cussons (UK) Ltd 3500 Aviator Way, Manchester M22 5TG See more
